notes: IMP-071: Changed .catch(() => {}) to .catch(() => { if (!cancelled) setImprovementsOpenCount(0); }) in sidebar.tsx. Badge now shows 0 on fetch error instead of blank. Pattern matches gap-analysis-view.tsx Copy button (setCopied + setTimeout reset).
